observations: Active scene 'EAF' is loaded but does NOT follow the standard VrseBuilder QueryObjects layout.
There is no QueryObjectsIdManager, so unity_vrse_query_objects_list returns an empty catalog.
Root layout uses '#h2  Interactables' and '#h2  Scene meshes' instead of 'QueryObjects/#h1 Story Objects/...'.
If creating a new story for this scene, the standard 4-call discovery cannot anchor scene objects. A custom inventory pass against '#h2  Interactables' / '#h2  Scene meshes' would be required.
